name: Transportation
description: Models for transportation systems including aviation, rail, maritime, urban transit, and last-mile delivery.

name: Aviation
description: Airport and aircraft operations, including security checkpoints, baggage handling, passenger flow, and ground services. Non-canonical sub-domain refinement of Transportation.

name: Service Operations
description: Cross-cutting domain for service-oriented queueing and resource-contention models that serve customers through finite-capacity resources, independent of a specific industry. Non-canonical cross-cutting theme — not part of the canonical industry taxonomy.
